# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'URL of the artifact to download')
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_NAME', defaultValue: '', description: 'Name of the artifact file')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_SERVERS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Comma separated list of production servers')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_PATH', defaultValue: '/opt/app', description: 'Path to deploy artifacts')
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactUrl = params.ARTIFACT_URL
                    def artifactName = params.ARTIFACT_NAME ?: "artifact-${UUID.randomUUID()}.jar"
                    
                    echo "Downloading artifact from: ${artifactUrl}"
                    sh "curl -L -o ${artifactName} ${artifactUrl}"
                    echo "Artifact downloaded as: ${artifactName}"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = params.DEPLOY_SERVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    def deployPath = params.DEPLOY_PATH
                    
                    for (server in servers) {
                        echo "Deploying to server: ${server}"
                        sh """
                            ssh ${server} "mkdir -p ${deployPath}"
                            scp ${params.ARTIFACT_NAME} ${server}:${deployPath}/
                            ssh ${server} "chmod +x ${deployPath}/${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}"
                        """
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        success {
            echo 'Deployment completed successfully'
        }
        failure {
            echo 'Deployment failed'
        }
    }
}
